name: Michael Hill International Limited
summary: Michael Hill International Limited owns and operates retail jewelry stores, and provides related services in Australia, New Zeeland, and Canada. The company operates its stores under the Michael Hill and Emma & Roe brand names. Its stores offer bracelets and bangles, earrings, pendants and necklaces, rings, chains, watches, gifts, and collections, as well as birthstones. As of June 30, 2019, Michael Hill International Limited operated 306 stores, including 305 Michael Hill stores and 1 Emma & Roe stores. It also offers professional care plans and in-house customer finance services; and operates Michael Hill and Emma & Roe e-commerce sites. The company was formerly known as Michael Hill New Zealand Limited and changed its name to Michael Hill International Limited in July 2016. Michael Hill International Limited was founded in 1979 and is based in Murarrie, Australia.
